purpose: Defines future routing for user questions, stories, corrections, feedback, palmistry questions, and palm image submissions.
guardrails: Do not collect palm image files until private storage and explicit consent are implemented.
Do not publish user stories or submissions without explicit permission.
Do not expose personal identifiers publicly.
Do not provide deterministic health, lifespan, finance, marriage, or guaranteed-outcome claims.
All submissions must enter review before being used in Knowledge Vault updates.
